name: blockchain-supply-chain-root
description: Blockchain-based Agricultural Supply Chain Transparency Platform

scripts.install-all: npm install && cd blockchain && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.deploy:local: cd blockchain && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.js --network localhost
scripts.deploy:sepolia: cd blockchain && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.js --network sepolia
scripts.test:all: npm run test:contracts && npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.clean: cd blockchain && npx hardhat clean && rm -rf node_modules && cd ../backend && rm -rf node_modules && cd ../frontend && rm -rf node_modules
scripts.setup: npm run install-all && npm run compile
scripts.start:all: concurrently "npm run dev:blockchain" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.lint: cd backend && npm run lint && cd ../frontend && npm run lint

author: AgriChain Team
